Interface Action

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
Visualize
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConnectAction, CreateGameAction, ExceptionAction, JoinAction, JoinSuccessAction, LoginAction, LoginFailedAction, LoginSuccessAction, UpdateGameAction, UpdateListAction, ViewComponent, ViewShipBoard
public interface Action extends Serializable
Represents an action that can be executed by the client. Actions are used to modify the client state and can be visualized.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClientState
    execute(ClientState state)
    Executes the action on the given client state.
    static ActionConstructor
    getConstructor()
    Gets the constructor for this action.
    default boolean
    isVisualize()
    Checks if the action should be visualized.

  • Method Details

    • execute

      ClientState execute(ClientState state)
      Executes the action on the given client state.
      Parameters:
      state - The current state of the client.
      Returns:
      The updated client state after executing the action.

    • isVisualize

      default boolean isVisualize()
      Checks if the action should be visualized. By default, actions are not visualized.
      Returns:
      true if the action should be visualized, false otherwise.

    • getConstructor

      static ActionConstructor getConstructor()
      Gets the constructor for this action. This method is used for serialization and deserialization of actions.
      Returns:
      The constructor for this action, or null if not applicable.
